generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft of the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTx
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the cycloidal gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTx
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor (I_M) measuring motor winding current of the PMSM"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTx
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – Data transmitted via MQTT
instance MotorEncoderDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data instances (time‑series floating‑point arrays)
instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angle (rad) streamed from MotorEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTx
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox output angle (rad) streamed from GearboxEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTx
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor winding current (A) streamed from MotorCurrentSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTx
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (Nm) computed from motor current using motor constants"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (rad/s) derived from encoder angle differentiation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance AngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration (rad/s²) derived from velocity differentiation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]

// C10: Model instances
instance SysMLAxisModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagram of the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the gearwheel transmission"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink Coulomb‑Viscous friction model used for identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelStribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink Stribeck friction model used for identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelDahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink Dahl friction model used for identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelLuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink LuGre friction model used for identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reference model defining the structure of the digital shadow (FrictionShadow)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

// C11: Enablers (tools, protocols, platforms)
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling environment used for structural engineering models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing motor, gearbox, and friction simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterUpdateService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling real‑time streaming of sensor traces (I_M, angles, derived data)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AAS providing standardized digital representation of the axis asset"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService
]

instance SINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller executing the robot control algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterUpdateService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard visualizing measured vs. simulated data and friction insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time dashboard visualizing measured versus simulated data for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides MeasuredVsSimulatedInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that identifies static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters from live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides IdentifiedFrictionParametersInsight
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that updates the robot control algorithm with newly identified friction coefficients"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateRobotControlAction
]

// C17: Insights and Actions
instance MeasuredVsSimulatedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing deviation between measured sensor traces and simulated model outputs"
]

instance IdentifiedFrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight delivering estimated static, kinetic and viscous friction values"
]

instance UpdateRobotControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically injects updated friction coefficients into the SINUMERIK 840D controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time (online) synchronization with the robot during operation, allowing immediate identification of friction changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of the physical asset (first axis), its engineering models (SysML), simulation models (Simulink), processing components that consume input data traces and produce simulated traces, data traces (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out, ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out), the purpose element (FrictionDerivation), and the FrictionShadow digital shadow container linking all elements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Both design/engineering stage (creation of SysML structural model and Simulink simulation models) and operational stage (runtime data acquisition and friction model updating) are covered."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point to its source and processing model; validation by comparing simulated friction‑free and friction‑inclusive models against measured reference data; use of manufacturer‑provided parameters and dynamic model exchange to maintain model fidelity over wear and tool changes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol; Asset Administration Shells are used for metadata and asset representation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation employs the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) as a standard for asset representation and SysML as a modeling standard for engineering models."
]
